kept.text:
Epic Games have made more updates to #Fortnite Reload 📝 

- Tactical Assault Rifle and Iron Pump Shotgun unvaulted
- Combat Shotgun vaulted
- Ranger, Combat Assault Rifle, O.X.R. Rifle, and Twin Mag SMG vaulted in Ranked
- Charge Shotgun and Dual Pistols vaulted in Slurp Rush

quoted_tweet.text:
#Fortnite Reload Updates in v40.30 🟪 

The Cube Splitter SMG is now available, blowing up opponents with sticky Cube-powered shots! Plus, the loot pool has been refreshed, and the map rotation has returned featuring Venture and Slurp Rush. https://t.co/aVMvGbZYKx
